/usr/bin/ar qc libsanctsound_core.a CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/Source/SanctSoundClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/Source/Utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/Source/PreviewModels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_core.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.mm.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsanctsound_core.a
